cart.addError: Tatwaishibe ukulenga mu cart. Wesheni limbi.
cart.deliveryEligible: Subtotal ya vendor yaisuminisha free Lusaka delivery — zone yalangwa pa checkout
cart.deliveryHint: Longeni {amount} limbi ukufuma ku vendor uyu pakuti mwasumina free Lusaka delivery
cart.deliveryScopeNote: Yakonka fye mu zones sha delivery sha Lusaka. Kunse kwa Lusaka, pickup yaisa. Zone fees shikonka ilyo muli panshi ya threshold.
cart.deliveryThreshold: Free Lusaka delivery ukufuma {threshold} pa vendor
cart.emptyBody: Twaleni ifintu no longeni items pakuti mwampe.
cart.freeDeliveryUnlocked: Subtotal ya vendor iyi yaisuminisha free Lusaka delivery
cart.title: Cart yenu
cart.updateError: Tatwaishibe ukuluka ubunji. Twabwelela ku amount iyasungwa.

card.failedBody: Card payment tayaipita. Mungawesha limbi ukufuma ku checkout.
card.heldBody: Tatwaishibe ukusuminisha payment iyi automatic. Team yesu yalishibikwa — mulipile limbi pantu tusuminisha.
card.pendingBody: Tuletekele final confirmation ukufuma ku Lenco. Peji iyi ileluka limbi.
card.secureNote: Yasungwa na Lenco — PCI compliant hosted checkout
card.subtitle: Kompleteni payment yenu secure pa Lenco. Vergeo5 tayamona ifya card yenu.
card.successBody: Order yenu yasuminishwa no payment yikwata bwino na Vergeo5. Mungalola ifya order nomba.
card.widgetUnavailable: Card payments tashaisa nomba. Wesheni mobile money nangu limbi.

payment.cardExplainer: Pantu mwaisa place order, mukompleta card payment pa Lenco secure hosted page. Vergeo5 tayamona ifya card yenu.
payment.codIneligible: Cash on delivery yaisa fye ku ama-order mpaka {cap}.
payment.codRejected: Cash on delivery teyaisa ku total iyi ya order
payment.error: Tatwaishibe ukusunga payment method. Wesheni limbi.
payment.paymentsDisabled: Payment ya online teyaisa nomba. Longeni Cash on Delivery ilyo yaisa, nangu wesheni limbi.
payment.subtitle: Payment yenu yikwata bwino mpaka kufika.
payment.title: Mufwaya ukulipila shani?

pending.cancelledBody: Mwakana mobile money prompt. Mungawesha limbi nangu saleni payment method yambi pa checkout.
pending.codBody: Sungeni {amount} mu cash ilyo order yenu yafika. Courier wesu akapoka payment pa delivery.
pending.confirmingBody: Twapoka signal ya payment no tulesuminisha order yenu. Ici teci final paid confirmation — loleni order status ku escrow updates.
pending.error: Tatwaishibe ukuleta payment status. Wesheni limbi.
pending.retryError: Tatwaishibe ukuwesha payment. Checkeni connection no wesheni limbi.
pending.timeoutBody: USSD prompt yafwile pantu yasuminishwa. Checkeni phone yenu ili na network, elyo wesheni — tutuma prompt yambi ku order imo.

checkout.reservationExpired: Reservation yenu yafwile — ifintu fyabwelela mu cart yenu.

review.consentLabel: Nasuminisha Terms & Conditions no Privacy Policy
review.subtitle: Checkeni fyonse fyabwino pantu mulipila.
review.title: Loleni order yenu

checkout.stockUnavailable: Icimo tacili mu stock. Loleni cart yenu.

ussd.airtelHelp: Isuleni Airtel Money prompt pa phone yenu no lemeni PIN pakuti musuminishe {amount}.
ussd.doNotClose: Sungileni peji ili open ilyo musuminisha pa phone.
ussd.genericHelp: Mobile money prompt yatuminwa ku phone yenu. Lemeni PIN pakuti musuminishe {amount}.
ussd.mtnHelp: Isuleni MTN MoMo prompt pa phone yenu no lemeni PIN pakuti musuminishe {amount}.
ussd.subtitle: Suminisheni prompt ya {amount} pa phone yenu pakuti mukomplete payment.
ussd.title: Loleni phone yenu
